text:
Thank you for reaching out, CID-5001! Unfortunately, I'm unable to book an electrical diagnostic at ZIP code **20147** (Loudoun County) at this time.

**Here's why:** Electrical services are not currently available in the Loudoun area through our Herndon branch or any overflow branch. This is a documented service limitation for that region.

**What we can do next:** I'd recommend escalating your request to our **Branch Manager**, who may be able to explore options or provide further guidance for your area.

I'm sorry for the inconvenience! Please don't hesitate to reach out if there's anything else I can help you with, or if you'd like us to connect you with the Branch Manager right away. 😊
